title: The Jester
writer: Joseph Green, Itzik Manger, Chaver Pahver
actors: Miriam Kressyn, Zygmunt Turkow, Hy Jacobson
plot: Getsel, a wandering Purim player, comes to a Galica village and gets a job with Reb Nuchem, the shoemaker. He falls in love with Esther, the shoemaker's daughter, but knows she is in love with a wandering circus player. However, G...
